playbook.intent: Stand up an AI-native product surface (new feature or new product) end-to-end: agentic capability shape, eval framework, safety + explainability, rollout, and steady-state operating model. Distinct from a normal MVP because of model risk, evals, and explainability.
playbook.scope: Stand up an AI-native product surface (new feature or new product) end-to-end: agentic capability shape, eval framework, safety + explainability, rollout, and steady-state operating model. Distinct from a normal MVP because of model risk, evals, and explainability.

success-criteria.criterion: Frozen, versioned eval set with 50+ scenarios
Agent rolled out behind kill switch + flag
Steady-state ops model documented and owned

stage.name: Capability shape
stage.intent: Decide the agentic shape before any code lands.

tasks.task: Pick the agent shape: assistant, autonomous worker, or in-product copilot
Map the JTBD the agent will own end-to-end
Articulate where the agent must defer to a human

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the agent shape is one of 3 named patterns and the human-in-loop boundary is explicit.

stage.name: Evals first
stage.intent: Build the eval set before the agent.

tasks.task: Draft 50+ frozen eval scenarios from real user JTBDs
Define passing criteria per scenario
Lock the eval set under version control

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the eval set is frozen, versioned, and has at least 50 scenarios.

stage.name: Safety + explainability
stage.intent: Decide what failure looks like and how the agent explains itself.

tasks.task: Enumerate top 5 failure modes with severity
Design refusal + escalation paths per failure
Define the user-facing explanation surface (citations, source, reasoning trace)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every top-5 failure mode has an explicit refusal or escalation path.

stage.name: Build
stage.intent: Implement the smallest agent that passes the eval set.

tasks.task: Wire the agent against tools / retrieval / memory as needed
Run the eval set every commit
Gate merges on eval pass rate

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the eval pass rate is above the documented threshold (no opinion-based shipping).

stage.name: Trust testing
stage.intent: Run the agent in front of users with the brakes engaged.

tasks.task: Run 10+ supervised sessions
Watch for refusal-rate, escalation-rate, and user-correction-rate
Iterate prompts/tools based on observed corrections

stage.decision-gate: Advance when user-correction-rate is below the documented threshold across 3 consecutive sessions.

stage.name: Rollout
stage.intent: Roll the agent out behind a kill switch.

tasks.task: Roll out behind a feature flag with kill switch
Ramp exposure in 1% → 10% → 50% → 100% stages
Watch eval drift weekly

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 50% exposure holds the eval pass rate for 7 days.

stage.name: Steady-state
stage.intent: Establish the operating model for the agent in production.

tasks.task: Define ownership for eval set, incidents, and model upgrades
Schedule weekly drift review
Establish a model-upgrade re-eval ritual

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written steady-state ops model the on-call team can execute.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content ai-native-product-introduction --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-native-product-introduction --format context, json: faion get-content ai-native-product-introduction --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
